debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : Field R
inst✝³ : LinearOrder R
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing R
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup E
inst✝ : Module R E
s : Finset ι
f : ι → E
t : Finset { x // x ∈ ↑s }
w : { x // x ∈ ↑s } → R
hw₀ : ∀ i ∈ t, 0 ≤ w i
hw₁ : t.sum w = 1
⊢ ∑ x ∈ {x ∈ s | ∃ (x_1 : x ∈ s), ⟨x, ⋯⟩ ∈ t}.attach, w ⟨↑x, ⋯⟩ = 1 ∧
    s.centerMass (fun i => if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, ⋯⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, ⋯⟩ else 0) f =
      (affineCombination R t (f ∘ Subtype.val)) w

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : t.sum w = ∑ x in s.filter (fun i ↦ ⟨i, by aesop⟩ ∈ t), w ⟨x, by aesop⟩ := by
        apply Finset.sum_bij (fun i _ ↦ i.1) (fun i hi ↦ by aesop) (fun i hi ↦ by aesop)
          (fun i j hi hj hij ↦ Subtype.ext hij) (fun i hi ↦ by aesop)
      rw [h₁, hw₁]
      constructor <;> simp [centerMass, affineCombination]
      <;> congr 1 <;> ext i <;> by_cases h : i ∈ s <;> simp_all

constructor
      · have : t.sum w = ∑ x in s.filter (fun i => ∃ h : i ∈ s, (⟨i, h⟩ : { x // x ∈ s }) ∈ t), w ⟨x, by aesop⟩ := by
          apply Finset.sum_subset
          · intro x hx
            aesop
          · intro x hx hnx
            exfalso
            aesop
        rw [this, hw₁]
      · ext
        simp [centerMass, affineCombination]
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro i hi
        split_ifs with h
        · congr
          aesop
        · exfalso
          aesop

        apply Finset.sum_bij
        · intro a _; exact ⟨a.1, a.2.1⟩
        · intro a ha; simp; aesop
        · intro a ha; simp; aesop
        · intro a b ha hb h; aesop
        · intro b hb; use ⟨b, by aesop⟩; simp; aesop
      rw [h1, hw₁]
      have h2 : s.centerMass (fun i => if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, x⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, Classical.choose h⟩ else 0) f =
          (∑ i in s, (if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, x⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, Classical.choose h⟩ else 0) • f i) / ∑ i in s, (if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, x⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, Classical.choose h⟩ else 0) := by
        simp [Finset.centerMass]
      have h3 : ∑ i in s, (if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, x⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, Classical.choose h⟩ else 0) = 1 := by
        rw [Finset.sum_dite]
        have : {i ∈ s | ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, x⟩ ∈ t} = t.val.image Subtype.val := by
          ext i; constructor <;> intro hi <;> simp_all [Subtype.exists]
        rw [this, Finset.sum_image]
        · simp [hw₁]
        · intro a b ha hb h; aesop
      rw [h2, h3]
      have h4 : ∑ i in s, (if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, x⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, Classical.choose h⟩ else 0) • f i =
          ∑ i in t, w i • f (Subtype.val i) := by
        apply Finset.sum_bij
        · intro a _; exact ⟨a.1, a.2.1⟩
        · intro a ha; simp; aesop
        · intro a ha; simp; aesop
        · intro a b ha hb h; aesop
        · intro b hb; use ⟨b, by aesop⟩; simp; aesop
      rw [h4]
      simp [affineCombination]
